name: Nvidia
description: Collaborated with Nvidia Deep Learning Institute to deliver a free 3-part YouTube video masterclass on deploying edge-node generative AI models, which garnered over 1.2M views.

name: GitHub
description: Appointed as an official ambassador for GitHub Education. Designed interactive repositories and hosted the 'Next-Gen Github Actions Hackathon' with $50k in student prizes.

name: Google Cloud
description: Partnered on a multi-city DevFest speaking tour highlighting serverless architectures and distributed web design, reaching 15,000+ developers live.

name: Apple Developer
description: Coordinated custom workshop series for students preparing submissions for the Swift Student Challenge, achieving a record-breaking 45 mentored winners globally.
